# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud storage security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

apiVersion: deploymentmanager.googleapis.com/v2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backup-storage-bucket
spec:
  resources:
  - name: backup-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: backup-bucket-${PROJECT_ID}
      storageClass: STANDARD
      location: US
      defaultEventBasedHold: false
      labels:
        environment: production
        purpose: backups
      encryption:
        defaultKmsKeyName: projects/${PROJECT_ID}/locations/us/keyRings/backup-ring/cryptoKeys/backup-key
      cors:
      - origin: []
        method: []
        maxAgeSeconds: 0
      logging:
        logBucket: backup-logs-${PROJECT_ID}
        logObjectPrefix: backup-logs
      website:
        mainPageSuffix: index.html
        notFoundPage: error.html
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
        publicAccessPrevention: enforced

apiVersion: deploymentmanager.googleapis.com/v2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: backup-storage-bucket
spec:
  resources:
  - name: backup-bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: backup-bucket-${PROJECT_ID}
      storageClass: STANDARD
      location: US
      defaultEventBasedHold: false
      labels:
        environment: production
        purpose: backups
      encryption:
        defaultKmsKeyName: projects/${PROJECT_ID}/locations/us/keyRings/backup-ring/cryptoKeys/backup-key
      cors:
      - origin: []
        method: []
        maxAgeSeconds: 0
      logging:
        logBucket: backup-logs-${PROJECT_ID}
        logObjectPrefix: backup-logs
      website:
        mainPageSuffix: index.html
        notFoundPage: error.html
      iamConfiguration:
        uniformBucketLevelAccess:
          enabled: true
        publicAccessPrevention: enforced
